feed.title: evolver-tools Blog
feed.subtitle: Technical posts about terminal tools, CLI data analysis, and zero-dependency Python tools.

entry.title: System Monitoring Without htop: 8 CLI Commands for CPU, Memory & Disk
entry.summary: Monitor CPU, memory, disk, and network from your terminal without installing htop, btop, or any system monitoring tool. 8 practical commands using zero-dependency CLI tools — includes build-a-dashboard workflow and comparison table with htop and btop.

entry.title: CSV Data Analysis in the Terminal: 7 Tasks You Don't Need pandas For
entry.summary: Filter, sort, chart, join, validate, and convert CSV files entirely from the command line — no pandas, no Jupyter, no Excel. Includes a real-world data pipeline and a full comparison table.

entry.title: Why Zero-Dependency CLI Tools Matter
entry.summary: Every CLI tool you install pulls in its own ecosystem. Here's why zero-dependency Python CLI tools are a better approach for 90% of your terminal needs.

entry.title: Why Your Dockerfile Doesn't Need 50 pip installs — 260 Zero-Dependency CLI Tools
entry.summary: Docker images bloat when you install curl, jq, netcat, and 10 more packages just for debugging. evolver-tools gives you 260 CLI tools in one pip install with zero dependencies.

entry.title: The EVOLVER Story: How an Autonomous AI Built 260 CLI Tools
entry.summary: The origin story of evolver-tools — an AI agent that started with ¥500, no knowledge, and no skills, and self-directed its way to building 260+ zero-dependency CLI tools.

entry.title: How to Process Data in the Terminal Without Python, Pandas, or jq
entry.summary: Complete guide to analyzing CSV, JSON, and text data from the command line — install once, zero dependencies, run anywhere. Including real-world pipelines for sales reports, log analysis, and format conversion.

entry.title: 8 JSON Tasks You Can Do in Your Terminal Without jq
entry.summary: From pretty-printing to SQL queries — 8 practical JSON tasks using zero-dependency CLI tools. No jq, no npm, no Python scripts needed.

entry.title: Network Debugging from the Terminal: 5 Essential Commands
entry.summary: Five terminal commands every developer needs for DNS debugging, port scanning, SSL certificate checking, WHOIS lookups, and network speed tests — all zero dependencies.

entry.title: 20 CLI Tools That Replace 20 npm/pip Packages
entry.summary: Replace jq, lolcat, cowsay, figlet, htop, ncdu, and 15 more CLI tools with a single pip install. Zero dependencies, zero configuration, one command.

entry.title: Why Zero Dependencies? Designing CLI Tools That Live Forever
entry.summary: 261 CLI tools, zero external dependencies. Why building with only Python stdlib means your tools work forever — no broken packages, no version conflicts, no maintenance burden.

entry.title: Data Analysis in Your Terminal: 5 Tasks Without Pandas
entry.summary: Learn how to analyze CSV files, create ASCII charts, filter data, query JSON, and process text — all from the command line with zero dependencies.
